local_results.title: Pizzaiolo
local_results.description: Long-standing, counter-serve pizza joint. Compact counter-serve spot selling NYC-style pies and slices, meatball subs, plus salads.
local_results.user_review: "The pizza was hot crunchy and the crust was absolutely to die for."

local_results.title: Flatbread Company
local_results.description: Wood-fired pizzas made in clay ovens. Wood-fired pizzas with organic ingredients & free-range meats, made in traditional clay ovens.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The pizza has a thin crust cooked perfectly and extraordinary toppings."

local_results.title: ZA
local_results.user_review: "The best crust, delicious toppings, and great service."

local_results.title: Pizza Villa
local_results.description: Old-school, family-run pizza institution. Low-key, old-fashioned family pizzeria offering pan-baked pies, sandwiches & a cash-only bar.
local_results.user_review: "Fun atmosphere, great pizza & beer, wonderful service!"

local_results.title: Lazzari
local_results.description: Casual joint for Italian cooking. Warm, low-key outlet serving Italian fare from pasta to wood-oven pies & veggies plus a full bar.
local_results.user_review: "Pizza is amazing, the crust is so fluffly yet crispy in all the right ways."

local_results.title: Portland Pie Company
local_results.description: Gourmet pizza with flavored crusts. Flagship of a regional pizzeria & pub known for flavored crusts, from basil or beer to gluten-free.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The dough was light and crunchy with the perfect amount of cheese."

local_results.title: Cargo Pizza Company
local_results.user_review: "Thin crust, fresh dough with char, loaded with toppings, quality cheese."

local_results.title: Monte's Fine Foods
local_results.user_review: "... best crust ever and quality ingredients makes for a top quality pizza."

local_results.title: Angelone's West
local_results.description: Longtime, family-run pizzeria known for quick bites, including pepperoni, green peppers, and onion pies.
local_results.user_review: "The pizza is light and crisp with a wonderful sauce that is not too sweet."

local_results.title: Tipo Restaurant
local_results.description: Airy stop for Italian-inspired plates. Bright neighborhood venue offering elevated Italian fare such as wood-fired pies & handmade pastas.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The crust is chewy deliciousness that reminds me of the pizza I had in Rome."

local_results.title: Brickyard Hollow Brewing Company
local_results.description: Industrial-chic space for upscale pizzas. Craft beers, gourmet pizza & protein bowls in an airy, industrial-chic venue with exposed pipework.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The beer cheese was creamy and the pizza was crispy and very flavorful."

local_results.title: Micucci Grocery Co.
local_results.description: Grocery store selling Italian meats and wines, plus deli eats, fluffy pizza and slab pizza.
local_results.user_review: "The crust is thick and chewy and doughy and delicious;"

local_results.title: OTTO
local_results.description: Gourmet pizzeria with custom options. Local pizza chain specializing in thin-crust, gourmet pies with create-your-own options.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Loved the crust, the service was fantastic and friendly."

local_results.title: Portland House of Pizza
local_results.description: Mainstay for pizza & calzones. Longtime area go-to for pizza & other basic Italian eats in casual digs or for takeout & delivery.
local_results.user_review: "This pizza place is a hidden gem—every bite bursts with flavor."

local_results.title: ViA VECCHiA
local_results.description: Stylish choice for classic Italian eats. Chic Italian eatery offering brunch staples, small plates, seafood & steak, plus wine & cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "his pizza reflects his mortal spirit and you can taste it."

local_results.title: Off Track Pizza
local_results.description: Casual, counter-serve joint serving New York-style pies and slices for lunch and dinner.

parking: Usually difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Crispy, thin crust - very close to a NY pie flavor!"

local_results.title: Kozeta's
local_results.description: Pizza eatery with traditional Greek pizza and an array of other sandwiches, pasta dishes and subs.
local_results.user_review: "The pizza has a crispy crust and the tomato sauce is sweet."

local_results.title: Riverton Station Pizza, Bar & Grill
local_results.description: Casual hangout featuring beer, cocktails, and pub grub, including pizza.
local_results.user_review: "The service was awesome, pizza was homemade, and prices are very reasonable."

local_results.title: Noble Pizzeria & Barbecue
local_results.description: Laid-back pizzeria featuring thin-crust pies, BBQ platters and burgers.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Thin, crispy/chewy crust, perfect amount of toppings."

local_results.title: Friends & Family
local_results.description: Cozy restaurant and market featuring pizza, small plates, and an eclectic selection of wines.
local_results.user_review: "The crust was perfectly thin and crunchy on the edges."
